case_title: MANUEL A. DIAZ VS. LE CLUB LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY DIAZ, MANUEL A. DBA C & M LIMOUSINE & TRANSPORTATION SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT LE CLUB LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, MANUEL A. DBA C & M LIMOUSINE & TRANSPORTATION SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LE CLUB LLC $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $78.25 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,058.25, DEFENDANT LE CLUB, LLC NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, MANUEL A. DBA C & M LIMOUSINE & TRANSPORTATION SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT LE CLUB LLC
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-17-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-19-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, UNABLE TO SERVE OTHER PARTY;ADDITIONAL TIME REQUESTED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, MANUEL A. DBA C & M LIMOUSINE & TRANSPORTATION SERVICES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED NOV-09-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LE CLUB LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2009 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED JAN-17-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LE CLUB LLC
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LE CLUB LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-11-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DECEMBER 12, 2008 IS INCOMPLETE. THERE IS NO MAILING DATE INDICATED ON THE FORM FOR SUB. SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
